Bus Timings

E315 Bus Timetable Etisalat to Muwailah Route

September 17, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Hey, ever heard of Etisalat Metro Station? It’s that big shot on Dubai’s Green Line in Al Qusais area.

Speaking of Muwailah, that place is on fire lately! It’s this up-and-coming hood in Sharjah that’s got everyone talking. Family-friendly, easy on the wallet, and a stone’s throw from Dubai. Talk about a win-win! Isn’t it wild how one little bus route can bridge two worlds? From Dubai’s buzz to Sharjah’s chill vibe - all in one ride. Who said commuting had to be boring?

Contents

E315 Bus Timing

The E315 bus operates with regular intervals, ensuring that passengers have a reliable mode of transport throughout the day. The first bus depart from Etisalat at 05.30 AM and the last bus departs at 11.00 PM. The buses run approximately every 20-30 minutes. And here is the complete of E315 bus timing From Etisalat From Muwailah
  05:00 05:10
  05:30 05:40
  06:00 06:10
  06:30 06:40
  07:00 07:10
  07:30 07:45
  08:00 08:15
  08:30 08:45
  09:00 09:15
  09:30 09:45
  10:00 10:15
  10:30 10:50
  11:00 11:20
  11:30 11:50
  12:00 12:20
  12:30 12:50
  13:00 13:20
  13:30 13:50
  14:00 14:20
  14:30 14:50
  15:00 15:20
  15:30 15:50
  16:00 16:20
  16:30 16:50
  17:00 17:25
  17:30 18:10
  18:00 18:40
  18:30 19:10
  19:00 19:40
  19:30 20:10
  20:00 20:40
  20:30 21:10
  21:00 21:35
  21:30 22:00
  22:00 22:30
  22:30 23:00
  23:00  

Download PDF Bus E315

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for E315 Bus Timings.## E315 Bus Route

The E315 bus route begins atEtisalat Metro Stationin Dubai and terminates atMuwailahin Sharjah, covering a variety of significant stops along the way. Here’s a detailed look at the route:

  1. Etisalat Metro Station: Located in the Al Qusais area of Dubai, this station is on the Green Line of the Dubai Metro.

2.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Sahara Centre: One of the largest shopping malls in Sharjah, offering a variety of retail, dining, and entertainment options.

  2. Al Taawun: A key residential and commercial area in Sharjah, close to Al Qasba and other attractions.

  3. Safeer Mall: Another major shopping destination in Sharjah, providing a wide range of stores and services.

  4. University City: Home to several universities and educational institutions, making it a crucial stop for students and staff.

7.

The fare for the E315 bus is AED 10, making it an economical choice for intercity travel.

While the journey may take some time, the combination of cultural experiences and urban landscapes makes it a worthwhile trip for anyone looking to explore the dynamic heart of Sharjah.## Conclusion

And knowing the E315 bus timing is one of the most important things that you should know before you make a trip.

Offering frequent, affordable, and comfortable transport, it bridges the gap between Dubai and Sharjah, making inter-emirate travel hassle-free.

Q: How long does the journey take on the E315 bus?A: The journey typically takes around 45 minutes to 1 hour, depending on traffic conditions.Q: Can I use the E315 bus to connect to other public transport options?A: Yes, the E315 bus connects with the Dubai Metro at Etisalat Metro Station, allowing for easy transfers to other parts of Dubai. The route passes several key landmarks and shopping centers, making it convenient for tourists to explore both Dubai and Sharjah.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 17, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
